Package com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.writable

Class ReadWriteObjectProperty<T>

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly.ReadOnlyObjectProperty<T>
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.writable.ReadWriteObjectProperty<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Observable, ObservableValue<T>, Property<T>, ReadOnlyProperty<T>, ReadWriteProperty<T>, ObservableObjectValue<T>, WritableObjectValue<T>, WritableValue<T>
public class ReadWriteObjectProperty<T> extends ReadOnlyObjectProperty<T> implements ReadWriteProperty<T>, WritableObjectValue<T>
